entity.label: Iram
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Citizen, chief of an Edomite tribe in Mount Seir (Gen. 36:43).

nodes.label: Iram
nodes.description: Citizen, chief of an Edomite tribe in Mount Seir (Gen. 36:43).

verses.text: Duke Magdiel, duke Iram: these be the dukes of Edom, according to their habitations in the land of their possession: he is Esau the father of the Edomites.
Duke Magdiel, duke Iram. These are the dukes of Edom.
